Title: Events Calendar Feed Component
URL: https://swatkb.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/DRUP/pages/20513083
Version: 6
---

The
Events Calendar Feed
component displays upcoming events from a
Swat Central
feed. This component can only be created and maintained by ITS administrators. To request the creation of
Events Calendar Feed
component on your site, email
support@swarthmore.edu
.
